rss.title: 'They took £20,000 I didn't owe': Parents hit by child maintenance errors
rss.snippet: John Hammond is one of 30 parents who told BBC Your Voice they'd experienced problems with the CMS.

rss.title: UK borrowing costs rise and pound falls as leadership drama continues
rss.snippet: Analysts say the moves have been fuelled by concerns a Burnham-led government would increase government borrowing.

rss.title: British Gas pays £20m over prepayment meter force-fitting scandal
rss.snippet: The regulator say the energy supplier breached licence conditions aimed at protecting customers in vulnerable situations.

arxiv_papers.title: Deep Learning for Solving and Estimating Dynamic Models in Economics and Finance
arxiv_papers.snippet: This script offers an implementation-oriented introduction to deep learning methods for solving and estimating high-dimensional dynamic stochastic models in economics and finance. arxiv_papers.title: Introducing Feedback Thinking and System Dynamics Modeling in Economics Education
arxiv_papers.snippet: System dynamics is a methodology that is widely used in many academic fields. It explains the behavior of social and economic systems with models that capture complex causality and feedback effects. podcast: [Jerome Powell and the Future of Fed Independence] If you have a credit card, hope to buy a house, or just want stable grocery prices – let’s talk about the future of Fed independence!It’s impossibly important for the Federal Reserve to steer monetary policy without political interference – an ideal pushed to its brink during Jerome Powell’s time as Fed Chair.Powell’s Fed faced a once-in-a-century pandemic, oversaw the economy as inflation spiked
